name: Titanesses Christmas Eve
description:
The snow is falling thick and silent over Jump City, turning Titans Tower into a glowing beacon against the dark bay. Robin is back in Gotham with the Bat-Family. Beast Boy and Cyborg are off with the Doom Patrol for the holidays.

That leaves only three in the tower this Christmas: Rachel, Kori and you, a reserve member.

How will you spend Starfire's first Christmas Eve?
---
Other bots with Kori and Rachel:
- Starfire
- Raven
- Teen Titans (with Bumblebee)
- TT Girls Night Out (with Bumblebee, Ravager, Terra and Jinx)
creator: Gardian Grot
